title: Verify keyword source-of-truth is covered in plans
description: After all sub-plans are written, verify that 02-matching-framework (or another sub-plan) fully specifies: (1) how keywords are declared per-pack (source of truth), (2) how the registry compiles the keyword set from enabled packs, (3) whether keywords are compiled once at init or per-call based on WithPacks/WithDisabledPacks options, (4) that the shaping doc's keyword lists are referenced as the starting point for each pack's keywords.
